response.justification: Strong generalist with 13+ years of full-stack experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, but the resume shows minimal evidence of the 8+ years building production GenAI solutions, RAG/vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks the role explicitly requires. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz, and there's no Python in the skills list despite it being a primary language. Could be worth a screening call given the recent MCP/agentic work, but the AI depth gap is significant for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
13+ years shipping production systems across TypeScript/Node.js, cloud, and data-heavy infrastructure
Demonstrated technical leadership, mentoring, and public-speaking/workshop track record fits customer-facing FDE profile
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years building production GenAI/AI-driven solutions — AI work appears to start only April 2025
Python not listed in skills; no RAG, vector database, or multi-agent framework (LangGraph/CrewAI) experience mentioned
Cloud breadth is thin — only AWS CDK referenced; no GCP/Azure, no data-pipeline-for-unstructured-data experience called out

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic tooling work
